promoted_facts.fact: Brand Marketing Fund 2024 spending breakdown: 22.1% digital media, 25.9% agency fees, 21.2% management salaries, 30.8% store community
Revenue from required purchases by unit franchisees: $1.292M (12.74% of $10.144M total revenue, per separate schedule). GCPS revenue from master franchisees: ~$8.68M
Typical time from FA signing to store opening: 150-240 days
GCA financing for intelligent beverage maker: 70% financed, 30% down, 10% annual interest, 6- or 12-month term
Franchisor can independently access all electronic data without compensation; no contractual limit on franchisor's right to use information
AI/Machine Learning prohibition on use of confidential information
No advertising council for unit/multi-unit franchisees; only master franchisee committee exists
Family member non-compete extension: immediate family engaging in Competitive Business triggers default
Release at FA signing (Section 27.6) — franchisee releases all claims prior to effective date upon execution
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not explicitly in reader report; found in contract depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: License fee from franchisor to GCG waived for 2024 (net income below $250K threshold); waived by Licensor
